message:
fix(test): add missing import and pub(crate) visibility for extracted workflow functions

- tantivy_reindex.rs: add `use std::path::Path` for recorder-lexical feature tests
- codex_exit.rs: pub(crate) for ctrl_c_injection_ok and CodexTokenUsage::has_any
- account_steps.rs: pub(crate) for persist_caut_refresh_accounts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -104,7 +104,7 @@ pub(crate) async fn refresh_and_select_account(
     })
 }
 
-async fn persist_caut_refresh_accounts(
+pub(crate) async fn persist_caut_refresh_accounts(
     storage: &StorageHandle,
     service: crate::caut::CautService,
     refresh: &crate::caut::CautRefresh,
